channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How Influencer Brandon Edelman made $768,000 in a year—and what he actually took home
item.description: We all know influencing can pay well—but just how well? Philadelphia-based influencer Brandon Edelman, known online as @bran_flakezz, recently went viral on TikTok after revealing he made $768,000 last year, primarily from brand partnerships and creator funds.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: UN report reveals alarming extent of Iran’s increased surveillance of women
item.description: Iran increasingly relies on electronic surveillance and the public to inform on women refusing to wear the country’s mandatory headscarf in public, even as hard-liners push for harsher penalties for those protesting the law, a United Nations report released Friday found.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: For March’s Patch Tuesday, 57 fixes
item.description: For so few patches from Microsoft this month (57), we have seven zero-days to manage (with a “Patch Now” recommendation for Windows) and standard release schedules for Microsoft Office, Microsoft browsers (Edge) and Visual Studio.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Stupendous Python stunts without a net
item.description: In this week’s Python Report: Sly tricks for setting up Python on a machine with no network, snappier Python code with asyncand await, swifter Python programs with Zig, and slicker web apps with HTMX and Django.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: West Virginia football coach Rich Rodriguez isn’t here for locker room dances
item.description: From the White House to the local police department, TikTok trends are now part of the cultural conversation—for better or worse. But don’t expect to see the latest dance craze in the West Virginia football team’s locker room.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Commerce secretary says Trump wants TikTok deal done under current deadline
item.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick on Friday said President Trump would like to hammer out a deal on TikTok's future ownership under the current deadline, saying the president "doesn't like to ask for extensions." "So, it's in Donald Trump's hands.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Apple Music Classical is now available on the web, but its Mac app is still nowhere in sight
item.description: Apple Music Classical has expanded once again and is now available online, but you'll have to wait longer for its native Mac app.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Apple releases emergency security update for serious vulnerability
item.description: A newly discovered security flaw with your iPhone or iPad could leave your personal information vulnerable to hackers. Kurt the CyberGuy explains.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Silent Hill f will present players with 'a beautiful yet terrifying choice', and I can't wait to see what it is
item.description: Silent Hill f is the series' first game to be set in Japan, and its blend of beauty and terror looks absolutely horrifying.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: A blueprint for effective cloud recovery
item.description: As businesses increasingly rely on multi-cloud environments, building cloud resilience becomes critical. In this article, we will explore the key components of cloud resilience and its importance in recovering from outages such as ransomware attacks.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Robotaxis are racking up tickets in San Francisco
item.description: San Francisco is a hot spot for Waymo vehicles, which operate without a human driver, but it seems the cars don't always play by the rules.
item.dc:creator: Ashley N. Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Why DeepSeek’s arrival looks like a key moment for safe AI
item.description: The AI industry is growing up fast. New model releases are now a regular event and premium AI features are quickly overtaken by free or freemium alternatives.
item.dc:creator: Donnchadh Casey, Fast Company

item.title: Java hiring plans slip, survey says
item.description: Slightly more than half of Java shops surveyed (51%) have plans to add more Java developers in the coming year, down from 60% in 2024, according to a report by Perforce, a provider of Java development and devops tools.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DOGE may be using an algorithm to fire federal workers
item.description: In the past month and a half, the Trump Administration has drastically reduced the federal government workforce. The cuts alone have generated concern and anger among workers and those who rely on US government services.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: House Oversight Democrats Slam Trump's Crypto Reserve Plan
item.description: House Oversight Democrats are urging President Trump to abandon his plans for a crypto reserve, citing conflicts of interest and potential financial gains at taxpayer expense.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Trump calls EU ‘nasty’ while sitting alongside NATO secretary
item.description: President Trump on Thursday called the European Union "nasty" while sitting alongside NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte. Trump complained about the steep tariff on U.S.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Greece says ambitious Mediterranean power cable project is on track despite setbacks
item.description: ATHENS, Greece (AP) — The future of an ambitious electricity cable linking the power grids of Greece, Cyprus and Israel by the end of the decade is on track despite a series of setbacks, Greece’s Foreign Minister Giorgos Gerapetritis said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: SpaceX delays flight to retrieve astronauts
item.description: NASA and SpaceX canceled Wednesday’s planned launch of the Crew-10 mission to retrieve astronauts from the International Space Station (ISS), citing an issue with the launch pad.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Meta to start testing crowd-sourced fact-checking, based on X example, next week
item.description: Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta Platforms Inc. said Thursday it will begin testing its crowd-sourced fact-checking program, Community Notes, on March 18. It will initially based on a ratings system used by Elon Musk's X. Meta ended its fact-checking program in January.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How DeepSeek innovated large language models
item.description: The release of DeepSeek roiled the world of generative AI last month, leaving engineers and developers wondering how the company achieved what it did, and how they might take advantage of the technology in their own technology stacks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: I’m a tech pro and these are my secrets to better flights and luxury travel
item.description: Here are some travel hacks to save money on your next vacation including setting up price alerts, remaining flexible and checking for 24-hour price drops.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google reportedly looking at smart glasses
item.description: After abandoning its Google Glass smart glasses in 2023, Google seems ready to take another kick at the can with what will reportedly be a $115 million acquisition of Canadian startup AdHawk Microsystems.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: French publishers and authors sue Meta over copyright works used in AI training
item.description: French publishers and authors said Wednesday they're taking Meta to court, accusing the social media company of using their works without permission to train its artificial intelligence model.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Designing a dynamic web application with Astro
item.description: Astro.js is among the most popular meta-frameworks for JavaScript developers, and for good reason. Astro makes it relatively easy to structure web applications for maximum effect with minimal effort.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: JavaOne 2025 heralds Java’s 30th birthday
item.description: With Java advancing toward its 30th anniversary, Oracle will hold its annual JavaOne conference next week, centering around the Java language, the evolution of the Java platform, and the role of Java in areas such as generative AI and machine learning.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Go-based TypeScript to dramatically improve speed, scalability
item.description: Microsoft is developing a native TypeScript implementation based on Google’s Go language. The initiative promises dramatic improvements in editor startup speed, build times, and memory usage, making it easier to scale TypeScript to large code bases, Microsoft said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 3 of the best LLM integration tools for R
item.description: When we first looked at this space in late 2023, many generative AI R packages focused largely on OpenAI and ChatGPT-like functionality or coding add-ins. Today, the landscape includes packages that natively support more LLM suppliers—including models run locally on your own computer.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages Monday that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk claimed that the social media platform was being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.” “We get attacked every day, but this was done with a lot of resources," Musk claimed in a post.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Transferring data from old laptop to new one
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about how to smoothly transfer your data from an old laptop to a new one using cloud storage or external drives.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
